title: Don't Stop 'Til You Get Enough
album: HIStory - PAST, PRESENT AND FUTURE - BOOK I
why_this_song: Don't Stop 'Til You Get Enough by Michael Jackson (1979) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 67 times; first heard in: "'Til you don't know how (ooh)"
Appears 66 times; first heard in: "Keep on with the force don't stop"
Appears 35 times; first heard in: "If you could keep on, because"
Appears 35 times; first heard in: "The force, it's got a lot of power"
Appears 32 times; first heard in: "Don't stop 'til you get enough"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "don't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Don't Stop 'Til You Get Enough" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Don't Stop 'Til You Get Enough" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Don't Stop 'Til You Get Enough" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Don't Stop 'Til You Get Enough", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Don't Stop 'Til You Get Enough" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Don't Stop 'Til You Get Enough" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
